title: nasturtium × capillipes
intro: Nasturtium × capillipes, a hybrid species of nasturtium, is a flowering plant known for its vibrant, delicate flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of nasturtium × capillipes include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote health.
